has-7-section-adr.evidence: Missing Compliance and Notes sections. Has: Title, Status, Context, Decision, Alternatives Considered, Consequences, Implementation Notes. 'Implementation Notes' is not the same as 'Notes' (meta-information section). No Compliance section at all.

has-significance-assessment.evidence: No assessment of whether the decision is architecturally significant.

has-both-positive-and-negative-consequen.evidence: Clear '### Positive' (6 items) and '### Negative' (6 items) subsections.

has-compliance-mechanism.evidence: No Compliance section. No discussion of how the decision will be enforced.

uses-active-voice-with-why.evidence: 'We will replace...' uses active voice, but the Decision section itself is brief (2 paragraphs) stating only WHAT. The WHY reasoning is scattered across the Alternatives Considered section, not emphasized in the Decision section.

detects-anti-patterns.evidence: No named anti-patterns or explicit diagnosis of decision-making dysfunction.

has-status-with-lifecycle.evidence: Status is 'Accepted'. Appropriate for a 6-person team decision.

applies-significance-dimensions.evidence: No reference to the 5 significance dimensions.

specifies-enforcement.evidence: No Compliance section. No enforcement mechanism specified.
